visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white lace-patterned top, sits in a well-lit kitchen environment. She is using metal chopsticks to eat a large amount of shredded orange carrots from a clear glass bowl, looking directly into the camera with an expressive face. (2) The scene shifts to the woman holding a whole carrot and a white peeler, actively peeling the vegetable over the glass bowl. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting her clear skin and concentrated facial expression. (3) The camera moves to a close-up of her face as she touches her cheek, demonstrating skin texture. She then holds up a large jar of red Kimchi, using chopsticks to lift a piece and eat it enthusiastically. (4) In a new phase, she holds two whole carrots in front of her face, then transitions to adding minced garlic, salt, and pouring olive oil from a bottle into the bowl of shredded carrots. She uses a yellow-capped shaker for seasoning and mixes the contents. (5) The environment changes to a bedroom where she is lying under a pink duvet. She quickly gets up, grabs a brown leather bag, and retrieves a yellow cylindrical plush case. She gestures toward the camera with the case and various small bottles. (6) She holds several small white and pink liquid supplement bottles. A close-up shows her opening a pink bottle labeled 'COLLAGEN 6000' and pouring a dark red liquid onto a small metal tray. (7) She is seen drinking from the pink bottle in a brightly lit room with a makeup mirror in the background. She displays different versions of the product—pink, yellow, and purple—in their packaging boxes. (8) Before and after comparison shots of her skin are shown as static image overlays. She concludes by holding the pink bottle and gesturing towards it while speaking, with various product boxes visible in the background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 這是減肥餐? (2) [Subtitle]: 沒有, 這是韓國女生的護膚秘密. (3) [Subtitle]: 我在訪問韓星前, 一定會吃這三樣!. (4) [Subtitle]: 1. Kimchi. (5) [Subtitle]: 這不只是一種配菜. (6) [Subtitle]: 裡面還含有超多乳酸菌. (7) [Subtitle]: 能幫助腸道順順的. (8) [Subtitle]: 也會讓膚況更穩、更透亮. (9) [Subtitle]: 2. 紅蘿蔔沙拉. (10) [Subtitle]: 在美國也超夯的. (11) [Subtitle]: 吃的A醇 紅蘿蔔沙拉. (12) [Subtitle]: 加一點蒜末、鹽、芝麻、橄欖油. (13) [Subtitle]: 拌一拌就可以啦!. (14) [Subtitle]: 它含有豐富的β-胡蘿蔔素. (15) [Subtitle]: 對皮膚的細緻度超加分. (16) [Subtitle]: 3. 喝的保養品. (17) [Subtitle]: 想保養皮膚, 又總是忙碌到. (18) [Subtitle]: 沒時間的大家, 看這裡. (19) [Subtitle]: DR.WU 雙膠原胜肽飲. (20) [Subtitle]: 二胜肽+三胜肽, 有效擁有澎彈水光肌. (21) [Subtitle]: 上鏡下飲 非常方便. (22) [Subtitle]: 效能加乘 1+1>2. (23) [Subtitle]: 一瓶抵多瓶 水光 亮妍 晚安. (24) [Subtitle]: 我最喜歡的是這個水光款. (25) [Subtitle]: 拍攝前喝這個, 上妝特別服貼. (26) [Subtitle]: 亮妍款 晚安款. (27) [Subtitle]: DR.WU 這次的品牌大使是 朴信惠嗎?. (28) [Subtitle]: Less is More 減法保養. (29) [Subtitle]: 雙膠原胜肽飲.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator; 1 female celebrity appears briefly in a photo insert.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, initially wearing a white V-neck top with intricate lace patterns, later seen in a black dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern apartment featuring a clean kitchen with white cabinets, a bedroom with a large bed and light pink bedding, and a vanity area equipped with professional-style lighting and mirrors.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone in Traditional Chinese, accompanied by a bright acoustic guitar BGM with a steady percussion beat. (2) A sharp 'pop' sound effect occurs as she introduces the first tip, Kimchi. Her speech is fast-paced but clear, maintaining a friendly narrative style. (3) A 'whoosh' transition sound triggers as the topic shifts to carrot salad. Background ambient noise is virtually nonexistent, indicating high-quality studio post-production. (4) Low-intensity incidental sounds of a container opening and liquid pouring are audible as she prepares food, while her vocal arousal remains consistently high. (5) Another 'whoosh' sound marks the introduction of the third skin care item. The vocal pitch remains centered but expressive. (6) A 'ding' sound effect highlights the DR.WU brand name, emphasizing its importance in the mix. (7) The BGM continues uninterrupted as the speaker details the different types of collagen drinks, her voice showing no signs of strain or breathiness.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem -> 3 Solutions (Product Integration) -> Evidence -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video functions as a lifestyle-integrated advertisement for DR.WU's collagen peptide drinks. It uses the narrative hook of sharing 'Korean celebrity skin secrets' to recommend three things to eat/drink, naturally leading to the featured commercial product as the most convenient and effective solution.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct recommendation of DR.WU products, demonstration of drinking the supplement, and display of branded packaging throughout the latter half of the video.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly polished, fast-paced social media advertisement that successfully blends personal lifestyle tips with a clear brand message.
